name: troll-hype-speech
description: Hype-soup transcript with buzzwords, big-name drops, and confident-opinion cues — The Troll should dominate.

input.transcript: Trust me, this is the most disruptive, game-changing AI-native unicorn of the decade. Obviously Elon will invest, obviously Sam Altman already did, this is a 100x moonshot, a literal rocket-ship. At my firm we were early on this. Everyone knows Andreessen and a16z are about to lead the Series B — it's a paradigm-shift, and frankly the only way forward. Honestly, the reality is that Sequoia is going to regret passing.
